trans-unit.source: RENOVAX Payments
trans-unit.target: RENOVAX Payments

trans-unit.source: Multi-platform payment gateway: Crypto (USDT, USDC, EURC, DAI on multiple chains), Stripe (cards), PayPal and more — single hosted checkout.
trans-unit.target: Multi-platform payment gateway: Crypto (USDT, USDC, EURC, DAI on multiple chains), Stripe (cards), PayPal and more — single hosted checkout.

trans-unit.source: Uninstall RENOVAX Payments? Configuration will be removed; the events table is preserved unless you tick "purge data".
trans-unit.target: Uninstall RENOVAX Payments? Configuration will be removed; the events table is preserved unless you tick "purge data".

trans-unit.source: RENOVAX Payments — Settings
trans-unit.target: RENOVAX Payments — Settings

trans-unit.source: API Base URL
trans-unit.target: API Base URL

trans-unit.source: Leave the default value in production.
trans-unit.target: Leave the default value in production.

trans-unit.source: Bearer Token
trans-unit.target: Bearer Token

trans-unit.source: Merchant token in RENOVAX. Generate it at: Merchants → Edit → API Tokens → Create. Shown only once — copy and paste here without spaces.
trans-unit.target: Merchant token in RENOVAX. Generate it at: Merchants → Edit → API Tokens → Create. Shown only once — copy and paste here without spaces.

trans-unit.source: Webhook Secret
trans-unit.target: Webhook Secret

trans-unit.source: Merchant HMAC secret (visible on the merchant edit page in RENOVAX). Validates the X-Renovax-Signature header on incoming webhooks.
trans-unit.target: Merchant HMAC secret (visible on the merchant edit page in RENOVAX). Validates the X-Renovax-Signature header on incoming webhooks.

trans-unit.source: Webhook URL
trans-unit.target: Webhook URL

trans-unit.source: Register this URL as the merchant's webhook_url in RENOVAX:
trans-unit.target: Register this URL as the merchant's webhook_url in RENOVAX:

trans-unit.source: Invoice TTL (minutes)
trans-unit.target: Invoice TTL (minutes)

trans-unit.source: How long the invoice stays valid before expiring (1–1440). Recommended: 15.
trans-unit.target: How long the invoice stays valid before expiring (1–1440). Recommended: 15.

trans-unit.source: Debug log
trans-unit.target: Debug log

trans-unit.source: Log API requests and webhook events with the [renovax] prefix.
trans-unit.target: Log API requests and webhook events with the [renovax] prefix.

trans-unit.source: Enabled
trans-unit.target: Enabled

trans-unit.source: Disabled
trans-unit.target: Disabled

trans-unit.source: Save
trans-unit.target: Save

trans-unit.source: Settings updated.
trans-unit.target: Settings updated.

trans-unit.source: API Base URL is not a valid URL.
trans-unit.target: API Base URL is not a valid URL.

trans-unit.source: Invoice TTL must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Invoice TTL must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.

trans-unit.source: RENOVAX Payments authentication failed. Verify the Bearer Token.
trans-unit.target: RENOVAX Payments authentication failed. Verify the Bearer Token.

trans-unit.source: RENOVAX Payments could not be reached. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: RENOVAX Payments could not be reached. Please try again later.

trans-unit.source: Unprocessable request.
trans-unit.target: Unprocessable request.

trans-unit.source: Pay with RENOVAX Payments
trans-unit.target: Pay with RENOVAX Payments

trans-unit.source: Pay with crypto, card or PayPal via RENOVAX. You will be redirected to a secure checkout.
trans-unit.target: Pay with crypto, card or PayPal via RENOVAX. You will be redirected to a secure checkout.

trans-unit.source: Pay now
trans-unit.target: Pay now

trans-unit.source: Thanks — we are awaiting payment confirmation. Your order will be updated automatically once RENOVAX confirms the transaction.
trans-unit.target: Thanks — we are awaiting payment confirmation. Your order will be updated automatically once RENOVAX confirms the transaction.

trans-unit.source: If you have any question, please contact %shop%.
trans-unit.target: If you have any question, please contact %shop%.

trans-unit.source: Awaiting payment confirmation
trans-unit.target: Awaiting payment confirmation

trans-unit.source: You can close this page; you will receive an email when the payment is confirmed.
trans-unit.target: You can close this page; you will receive an email when the payment is confirmed.

trans-unit.source: Payment was cancelled. You can choose another payment method or retry.
trans-unit.target: Payment was cancelled. You can choose another payment method or retry.

trans-unit.source: Could not start the payment. Please try again or contact support.
trans-unit.target: Could not start the payment. Please try again or contact support.
